headline: Amazon Leans Into AI With Pinterest Deal And Anthropic IPO Upside
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) signs a US$4b cloud services agreement with Pinterest to expand AI infrastructure on AWS. The Pinterest deal is described as the largest infrastructure commitment in Pinterest's history, focused on AI, cloud, and chip utilization. Anthropic files confidentially for an IPO at a valuation reported near US$1t, with Amazon holding an equity stake of about 21%.
